title: HMRC economic crime supervision annual assessment report: 2022 to 2024
body: "As part of HMRC’s ongoing commitment to the Economic Crime Plan 2019 to 2022 and [Economic Crime Plan 2023 to 2026] (https://www.gov.uk/government/publications/economic-crime-plan-2023-to-2026), we have published this self-assessment of our economic crime supervision performance which covers the period from 1 April 2022 to 31 March 2024.  "
